name: elegy-question-studio
description: Structured quiz question generation and validation for Elegy.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and validate structured quiz question sets.
interface.longDescription: Create, validate, and export structured question sets through a bundled CLI. The implementation ships as a proprietary plugin archive while this wrapper provides public Elegy marketplace metadata.
defaultPrompt: Use Question Studio to validate a structured quiz question set.
Plan a question set schema with Question Studio.
